title: Fermented Brazilian Baby Pak Koi Skewers
description: A flavorful ovo-vegetarian dish featuring fermented baby pak koi, cheese pull, and Brazilian spices, grilled to perfection on a robata grill.
instructions: Soak the bamboo skewers in water for 30 minutes before grilling.
Pressure cook the fermented baby pak koi for 10 minutes to tenderize.
Mix the shredded cheese with coconut milk and Brazilian spice blend in a bowl.
Thread the pressure cooked baby pak koi onto the skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with olive oil and season with salt and black pepper.
Grill the skewers on a robata grill for 5 minutes per side, or until slightly charred.
Serve the grilled skewers with the cheese mixture, allowing the cheese to pull and stretch.
Garnish with fresh herbs, if desired.
